start.text: Be on your way, tomb-traveller.~ Don't hang around. This is no place to dawdle.~ I have my eye on you.~ Try anything funny and watch what happens.~ You look weak. You shouldn't stay here.
start.choice: You look well equipped. What are you searching for in the low catacombs?

node.text: That's none of your business, dweller. Now go.

{{emote|*She scoffs.*}}
A whelp like you? As if. Go pilfer trash—you've wasted enough of my time.

choice.text: You can tell me what you're searching for or I can kill you and put the pieces back together myself.

node.choice: I'm no ordinary graverobber. You're speaking to a living legend.
Your haught bores me. Live and drink, graverobber.

node.text: You think you're real smart, don't you? Prove it then, whelp.

choice.IfHaveItem: (The Kesil Face OR The Shemesh Face OR The Earth Face OR The Levant Face OR The Olive Face OR The Nil Face)
choice.text: I bet you've never seen this before... {{emote|*Show her a mask of the Sultanate.*}}

node.choice: How can I prove it to you?

node.text:
Show me the face of a sultan. It's a graverobber's holy grail—but nobody's had the guts to take one yet.
Not that you could. You'll just get yourself killed.
node.choice: I'll be back. Live and drink.

node.text:
What—you actually stole one? I... I never thought I'd see one of these.
It's immaculate... it almost feels holy.
But not holy enough to leave a corpse alone, eh?
node.choice: Now, tell me what you're searching for.

choice.text: Your insubordinance will be your last mistake, graverobber.

node.text:
Tch. You have a lot of gall to threaten me like that. You must be tougher than you look. Okay, listen—
I have it on good word there's a secret cache under the tomb. An ancient trove of untapped technology, and *I have the key.* They say it's well hidden. I'm searching for the door.
If I find it, I will never have to work for water again. I can build a house in the far reaches of Qud and drink as much water as I please.

You must be tougher than you look.
I have it on good word there's a secret cache under the tomb. An ancient trove of untapped technology, and *I have the key.* They say it's well hidden. I'm searching for the door.
If I find it, I will never have to work for water again. I can build a house in the far reaches of Qud and drink as much water as I please.
node.choice: Give me the key, then. I'll find it for you.
I'll pass—I've plenty of water. Live and drink.

node.text: Not a chance. I'll die before I let this key fall into anyone else's hands.
node.choice: Follow me, then. We're finding this treasure.

choice.text: Your insubordinance will be your last mistake, graverobber.

node.text: If *we* find it, we'll split the loot... {{emote|she takes a moment to think...}} 70/30.

choice.text: You have a deal. Let's find it.

node.text: Finder's fee, whelp. I paid good water for this tip.

node.choice: Onward and into the depths. {{magenta|[Gain companion.]}}

node.text:
Lead the way. I'll be close behind—turning over every stone.
If you find the door, tell me. I'm not giving up this key, but I'll unlock the way forward for us.
